---
title: "04 - VAR / VECM Modeling, IRF & Granger Causality"
subtitle: ECON 612 Time Series Project
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
packages <- c("tidyverse", "vars", "urca", "tseries", "ggplot2", "lmtest")
for (pkg in packages) {
  if (!require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)) install.packages(pkg)
  library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
}

select <- dplyr::select

df <- read_csv("../data/clean/monthly_panel_with_vol.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```
```{r}
colnames(df)
```

# 1. 准备变量

```{r prepare-vars}
# 三个核心变量:
#   log_fx     = log(EUR/CNY)
#   garch_vol  = GARCH 条件方差
#   log_trade  = log(出口额)

var_data <- df %>%
  dplyr::select(date, log_fx, garch_vol, log_trade) %>%
  drop_na()

cat("观测数:", nrow(var_data), "\n")
cat("样本区间:", as.character(min(var_data$date)), "至",
    as.character(max(var_data$date)), "\n")
```

# 2. 平稳性确认

```{r stationarity-check}
cat("=== ADF: log_fx ===\n")
print(adf.test(var_data$log_fx))

cat("\n=== ADF: garch_vol ===\n")
print(adf.test(var_data$garch_vol))

cat("\n=== ADF: log_trade ===\n")
print(adf.test(var_data$log_trade))

# 差分后
cat("\n=== ADF: Δlog_fx ===\n")
print(adf.test(diff(var_data$log_fx)))

cat("\n=== ADF: Δlog_trade ===\n")
print(adf.test(diff(var_data$log_trade)))
```

# 3. 协整检验（关键分岔点）

```{r johansen}
# 对 I(1) 变量做 Johansen 协整检验
# 注意: garch_vol 可能已经是 I(0)，先看上面 ADF 结果

y_level <- var_data %>%
  select(log_fx, log_trade) %>%
  as.matrix()

# Trace test
jo_trace <- ca.jo(y_level, type = "trace", ecdet = "const", K = 4)
cat("=== Johansen Trace Test ===\n")
summary(jo_trace)
```

```{r johansen-eigen}
# Max eigenvalue test
jo_eigen <- ca.jo(y_level, type = "eigen", ecdet = "const", K = 4)
cat("=== Johansen Max Eigenvalue Test ===\n")
summary(jo_eigen)
```

> **根据上面的检验结果，选择路径 A (VAR) 或路径 B (VECM)。**
> 如果 trace 统计量 > 临界值 → 存在协整 → 路径 B。

---

# 4A. 路径 A：VAR 模型（无协整）

对 I(1) 变量取差分后建 VAR。

```{r var-data-prep}
var_diff <- var_data %>%
  mutate(
    d_log_fx    = c(NA, diff(log_fx)),
    d_log_trade = c(NA, diff(log_trade))
  ) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  select(d_log_fx, garch_vol, d_log_trade)
```

```{r var-lag-select}
lag_select <- VARselect(var_diff, lag.max = 12, type = "const")
cat("=== Lag Selection ===\n")
print(lag_select$selection)
```

```{r var-fit}
# 用 AIC 推荐的 lag（也可以用 BIC 的）
optimal_lag <- lag_select$selection["AIC(n)"]
cat("选择 lag =", optimal_lag, "\n")

var_fit <- VAR(var_diff, p = optimal_lag, type = "const")
summary(var_fit)
```

# 4B. 路径 B：VECM 模型（有协整）

如果协整检验显著，用以下代码替代路径 A。

```{r vecm-fit}
# ----- 取消注释以使用 VECM -----
# 如果要在 VAR 系统中包含 garch_vol，需要把它也加进去:
# y_all <- var_data %>%
#   select(log_fx, garch_vol, log_trade) %>%
#   as.matrix()
# jo_all <- ca.jo(y_all, type = "trace", ecdet = "const", K = 4)
# summary(jo_all)

# vecm_fit <- cajorls(jo_trace, r = 1)   # r = 协整秩
# summary(vecm_fit$rlm)

# 转换为 VAR 形式（做 IRF 用）:
# var_from_vecm <- vec2var(jo_trace, r = 1)
```

# 5. 模型诊断

```{r diagnostics}
# 使用 var_fit（路径A）或 var_from_vecm（路径B）
model <- var_fit

# 残差自相关
cat("=== Serial Correlation Test ===\n")
print(serial.test(model, lags.pt = 12, type = "PT.asymptotic"))

# 残差正态性
cat("\n=== Normality Test ===\n")
print(normality.test(model, multivariate.only = TRUE))

# ARCH 效应
cat("\n=== ARCH Test ===\n")
print(arch.test(model, lags.multi = 5))
```

```{r stability, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
# 稳定性: 特征根应在单位圆内
cat("特征根模:\n")
print(roots(model))
cat("全部 < 1?", all(roots(model) < 1), "\n")
```

# 6. Granger 因果检验

```{r granger}
cat("=== garch_vol → d_log_trade? ===\n")
print(causality(var_fit, cause = "garch_vol"))

cat("\n=== d_log_fx → d_log_trade? ===\n")
print(causality(var_fit, cause = "d_log_fx"))

cat("\n=== d_log_trade → garch_vol? (反向) ===\n")
print(causality(var_fit, cause = "d_log_trade"))
```

# 7. 脉冲响应函数 (IRF)

```{r irf-vol, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# 波动率冲击 → 贸易额
irf_vol2trade <- irf(model,
                      impulse  = "garch_vol",
                      response = "d_log_trade",
                      n.ahead  = 12,
                      ortho    = TRUE,
                      boot     = TRUE,
                      ci       = 0.95,
                      runs     = 1000)
plot(irf_vol2trade,
     main = "Response of Trade to Volatility Shock")
```

```{r irf-fx, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# 汇率冲击 → 贸易额
irf_fx2trade <- irf(model,
                     impulse  = "d_log_fx",
                     response = "d_log_trade",
                     n.ahead  = 12,
                     ortho    = TRUE,
                     boot     = TRUE,
                     ci       = 0.95,
                     runs     = 1000)
plot(irf_fx2trade,
     main = "Response of Trade to Exchange Rate Shock")
```

## 7.1 自定义 IRF 图（论文用）

```{r irf-ggplot, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
irf_data <- data.frame(
  period = 0:12,
  irf    = as.numeric(irf_vol2trade$irf$garch_vol[, "d_log_trade"]),
  lower  = as.numeric(irf_vol2trade$Lower$garch_vol[, "d_log_trade"]),
  upper  = as.numeric(irf_vol2trade$Upper$garch_vol[, "d_log_trade"])
)

ggplot(irf_data, aes(x = period)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
              fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(y = irf), color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:12) +
  labs(
    title = "Impulse Response: Volatility Shock → Trade",
    subtitle = "Response of Δlog(Trade) to 1 SD shock in GARCH Volatility",
    x = "Months After Shock",
    y = "Response"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

# 8. 方差分解

```{r fevd, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
fevd_result <- fevd(model, n.ahead = 12)
plot(fevd_result)

# 贸易额的方差分解
cat("=== Forecast Error Variance Decomposition: d_log_trade ===\n")
print(fevd_result$d_log_trade)
```

# 9. 稳健性检验（可选）

```{r robustness, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# Generalized IRF（不依赖 Cholesky 顺序）
irf_gen <- irf(model,
               impulse  = "garch_vol",
               response = "d_log_trade",
               n.ahead  = 12,
               ortho    = FALSE,
               boot     = TRUE,
               runs     = 1000)
plot(irf_gen,
     main = "Generalized IRF: Volatility → Trade")
```

# 10. 小结

> **核心发现：**
>
> - 协整检验结果 → 选了 VAR 还是 VECM？
> - Granger 因果：波动率是否显著 Granger-cause 贸易额？
> - IRF：
>   - 波动率冲击对贸易额的影响方向（正/负）？
>   - 峰值在第几个月？
>   - 多久消退？
> - 对跨境支付企业和政策制定者的含义？
